title: Job Vacancies at Zee Recruits
content:
Zee Recruits is a dynamic lifestyle and entertainment company committed to delivering exceptional experiences through innovative services and customer-focused solutions. The company specializes in creating engaging environments that combine entertainment, hospitality, and modern lifestyle services.

At our company, our mission is to provide a vibrant and enjoyable atmosphere where customers can relax, socialize, and enjoy premium entertainment services. We pride ourselves on professionalism, quality service delivery, and maintaining high operational standards.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the positions below:

1.) Content Creator
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Responsibilities
Content Creation & Production:


	Create engaging content (photos, videos, reels, and graphics) for social media platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Snapchat
	Capture high-quality visuals of:
	
		Food and drinks presentation
		Restaurant ambiance and décor
		Live entertainment and events
		Customer experiences (with consent)
	
	
	Develop creative concepts that align with the restaurant’s luxury and lifestyle positioning


Social Media Management:


	Plan, schedule, and publish content consistently across all platforms
	Write compelling captions using storytelling, trends, and relevant hashtags
	Monitor engagement (likes, comments, shares) and respond professionally
	Grow the restaurant’s online presence and audience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Digital Marketer

Job Location: Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Key Responsibilities


	Manage the restaurant’s social media accounts (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok)
	Create and post engaging content about food, drinks, events, and ambiance
	Run online advertisements and promotions to attract customers
	Respond to messages, comments, and customer inquiries online
	Promote events, special offers, and themed nights
	Work with influencers to increase visibility
	Monitor online reviews and maintain a positive brand image
	Track performance (engagement, reach, bookings) and improve strategies.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Officer",
  "description": "Gift Imagination is a leading brand in the production, sourcing and supply of promotional items and souvenirs for organisations across sectors. We help organisations create lasting connections with their audiences through bespoke merchandise and corporate gifts that leave lasting impressions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations&nbsp;Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Marina, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Operations / Administration

Job Summary


	The Operations Officer plays a key role in ensuring the smooth execution of client orders from initiation to final delivery.
	The role involves liaising with clients to gather detailed job requirements, coordinating internal teams and processes, and ensuring accurate execution of branding and product specifications.
	The role also provides strong administrative and client service support, including people management coordination, client onboarding, and accurate data management to ensure seamless operational delivery across all functions.


Core Function


	Client service administration, people management, operational coordination, and accurate data management for client registration and onboarding.


Key Responsibilities
Operations &amp; Order Fulfilment:


	Coordinate and monitor daily operational activities to ensure smooth execution of all orders.
	Liaise with clients to gather detailed job specifications and requirements.
	Confirm pricing, prepare quotations, and support proposal development.
	Source and coordinate samples for client review and presentation.
	Ensure timely execution, dispatch, and delivery of client orders and samples.
	Support planning and execution of bulk gifting projects and brand campaigns.


People Management &amp; Coordination:


	Coordinate internal teams and ensure alignment of tasks across functions.
	Support workflow allocation and follow-up to ensure timely execution of responsibilities.
	Monitor team activity progress and ensure deadlines and service standards are met.
	Foster effective communication between departments to ensure operational alignment.
	Measure and track team performance against assigned tasks, deadlines, and operational KPIs to ensure accountability, productivity, and continuous improvement.
	Identify performance gaps and escalate or recommend corrective actions where necessary.


Inventory &amp; Records Management:


	Maintain accurate and up-to-date inventory records for all gift items and packaging materials.
	Monitor stock levels and generate reports for replenishment planning.
	Ensure proper documentation of all operational activities, including invoicing and order tracking.
	Maintain organized digital and physical filing systems.


Client Service &amp; Administration:


	Support client onboarding, registration, and data capture processes.
	Manage client communication professionally and ensure timely response to enquiries.
	Maintain accurate client databases and operational records.
	Ensure adherence to internal policies and client-specific requirements.


Process Improvement &amp; Documentation:


	Contribute to the development and continuous improvement of operational procedures and workflows.
	Assist in compiling and maintaining the Operations Playbook (standard operating procedures for the organization).
	Recommend efficiency improvements to enhance service delivery and operational effectiveness.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree with 3 - 4 years of experience.


Key Attributes &amp; Competencies:


	Proactive and solution-oriented mindset
	Strong sense of responsibility and accountability
	Excellent attention to detail and accuracy
	Strong customer service orientation
	Strong people management and coordination skills
	High endurance and ability to work under pressure
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and within a team.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary package
	HMO (Health Maintenance Organisation) coverage
	Pension contribution
	Opportunity to work with a fast-scaling premium procurement and brand solutions firm
	Exposure to high-value corporate clients and strategic sourcing networks
	Performance-driven environment with clear growth and earning potential
	High autonomy and ownership of business development outcomes.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated curriculum Vitae to:&nbsp;hr@giftimagination.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Operations Officer Job at Gift Imagination




        
    

        
        Gift Imagination is a leading brand in the production, sourcing and supply of promotional items and souvenirs for organisations across sectors. We help organisations create lasting connections with their audiences through bespoke merchandise and corporate gifts that leave lasting impressions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Officer

Job Location: Marina, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Operations / Administration

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Operations Officer plays a key role in ensuring the smooth execution of client orders from initiation to final delivery.
	The role involves liaising with clients to gather detailed job requirements, coordinating internal teams and processes, and ensuring accurate execution of branding and product specifications.
	The role also provides strong administrative and client service support, including people management coordination, client onboarding, and accurate data management to ensure seamless operational delivery across all functions.


Core Function


	Client service administration, people management, operational coordination, and accurate data management for client registration and onboarding.


Key Responsibilities
Operations & Order Fulfilment:


	Coordinate and monitor daily operational activities to ensure smooth execution of all orders.
	Liaise with clients to gather detailed job specifications and requirements.
	Confirm pricing, prepare quotations, and support proposal development.
	Source and coordinate samples for client review and presentation.
	Ensure timely execution, dispatch, and delivery of client orders and samples.
	Support planning and execution of bulk gifting projects and brand campaigns.


People Management & Coordination:


	Coordinate internal teams and ensure alignment of tasks across functions.
	Support workflow allocation and follow-up to ensure timely execution of responsibilities.
	Monitor team activity progress and ensure deadlines and service standards are met.
	Foster effective communication between departments to ensure operational alignment.
	Measure and track team performance against assigned tasks, deadlines, and operational KPIs to ensure accountability, productivity, and continuous improvement.
	Identify performance gaps and escalate or recommend corrective actions where necessary.


Inventory & Records Management:


	Maintain accurate and up-to-date inventory records for all gift items and packaging materials.
	Monitor stock levels and generate reports for replenishment planning.
	Ensure proper documentation of all operational activities, including invoicing and order tracking.
	Maintain organized digital and physical filing systems.


Client Service & Administration:


	Support client onboarding, registration, and data capture processes.
	Manage client communication professionally and ensure timely response to enquiries.
	Maintain accurate client databases and operational records.
	Ensure adherence to internal policies and client-specific requirements.


Process Improvement & Documentation:


	Contribute to the development and continuous improvement of operational procedures and workflows.
	Assist in compiling and maintaining the Operations Playbook (standard operating procedures for the organization).
	Recommend efficiency improvements to enhance service delivery and operational effectiveness.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree with 3 - 4 years of experience.


Key Attributes & Competencies:


	Proactive and solution-oriented mindset
	Strong sense of responsibility and accountability
	Excellent attention to detail and accuracy
	Strong customer service orientation
	Strong people management and coordination skills
	High endurance and ability to work under pressure
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and within a team.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary package
	HMO (Health Maintenance Organisation) coverage
	Pension contribution
	Opportunity to work with a fast-scaling premium procurement and brand solutions firm
	Exposure to high-value corporate clients and strategic sourcing networks
	Performance-driven environment with clear growth and earning potential
	High autonomy and ownership of business development outcomes.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated curriculum Vitae to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We help organisations create lasting connections with their audiences through bespoke merchandise and corporate gifts that leave lasting impressions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Marina, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	The Admin Executive is responsible for supporting and coordinating the organization&rsquo;s administrative, operational, and client service functions.
	The role ensures smooth day-to-day operations through effective vendor management, accurate pricing and invoicing, inventory control, and timely execution of client orders and projects.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative &amp; Operational Support:


	Coordinate daily administrative and operational activities
	Maintain proper documentation and filing systems (digital and physical)
	Support the development and maintenance of operational processes and SOPs


Client &amp; Presentation Management:


	Respond to client briefs in a timely and professional manner
	Prepare PowerPoint presentations and proposal documents
	Support preparation and delivery of client samples and project materials


Procurement &amp; Vendor Management:


	Source vendors and suppliers for promotional and gifting items
	Negotiate pricing and ensure cost efficiency
	Maintain strong vendor relationships to ensure quality and timely delivery


Pricing, Invoicing &amp; Accounting Support:


	Analyze and compute product pricing for client orders
	Prepare and issue invoices accurately and on time
	Maintain financial records and support basic accounting activities
	Assist with expense tracking and reconciliation


Inventory &amp; Logistics Management:


	Maintain accurate inventory records for products and packaging materials
	Monitor stock levels and provide timely reports
	Coordinate logistics and ensure timely delivery of orders and samples


Project &amp; Order Fulfillment:


	Support execution of bulk gifting projects and campaigns
	Track orders from sourcing to final delivery
	Ensure adherence to timelines, quality standards, and client requirements


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Accounting, or related field
	3&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in administration, operations, procurement, or similar role
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint
	Good understanding of pricing, invoicing, and basic accounting principles
	Experience in vendor sourcing and management
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and coordination abilities
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment


Key Competencies:


	Administrative and operational coordination
	Vendor sourcing and negotiation
	Pricing and cost analysis
	Inventory and logistics management
	Accounting and financial record support
	Attention to detail and problem-solving.

	Competitive salary package
	HMO (Health Maintenance Organisation) coverage
	Pension contribution
	Opportunity to work with a fast-scaling premium procurement and brand solutions firm
	Exposure to high-value corporate clients and strategic sourcing networks
	Performance-driven environment with clear growth and earning potential
	High autonomy and ownership of business development outcomes.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should&nbsp;send their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@giftimagination.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.",

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Analyst",
  "description": "TAG Energy is an integrated service company offering a comprehensive range of oilfield products and support services in the Nigerian Oil and Gas Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Analyst

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Job Type: Permanent

Responsibilities


	Analyze operational data to identify trends, inefficiencies, and areas for improvement in offshore service delivery.
	Develop and maintain operational dashboards and reports to track key performance indicators (KPIs) for all projects.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including offshore operations, logistics, and QHSE, to gather information and implement solutions.
	Support the planning and execution of offshore operational activities, ensuring alignment with project timelines and budgets.
	Conduct root cause analysis for operational issues and propose corrective and preventive actions.
	Assist in forecasting operational needs, including resource allocation, equipment, and personnel for offshore engagements.
	Monitor industry best practices and regulatory requirements related to offshore oil and gas operations.
	Contribute to the continuous improvement of operational processes and procedures for enhanced performance.


General Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Engineering, Operations Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	5 - 7 years of progressive experience in operations analysis, preferably within the oil and gas industry.
	Proficiency in data analysis tools and techniques (e.g., Excel, SQL, Power BI, Tableau).
	Demonstrated ability to interpret complex operational data and translate it into actionable insights.
	Strong understanding of oil and gas upstream operations, including offshore service delivery.
	Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and critical thinking skills.
	Effective communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate across diverse teams.
	Experience with project management methodologies is a plus.
	Familiarity with QHSE standards and practices in the oil and gas sector.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, demanding environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruit4talents1@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Operations Analyst Job at TAG Energy




        
    

        
        TAG Energy is an integrated service company offering a comprehensive range of oilfield products and support services in the Nigerian Oil and Gas Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Analyst

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Job Type: Permanent

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Analyze operational data to identify trends, inefficiencies, and areas for improvement in offshore service delivery.
	Develop and maintain operational dashboards and reports to track key performance indicators (KPIs) for all projects.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including offshore operations, logistics, and QHSE, to gather information and implement solutions.
	Support the planning and execution of offshore operational activities, ensuring alignment with project timelines and budgets.
	Conduct root cause analysis for operational issues and propose corrective and preventive actions.
	Assist in forecasting operational needs, including resource allocation, equipment, and personnel for offshore engagements.
	Monitor industry best practices and regulatory requirements related to offshore oil and gas operations.
	Contribute to the continuous improvement of operational processes and procedures for enhanced performance.


General Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, Operations Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	5 - 7 years of progressive experience in operations analysis, preferably within the oil and gas industry.
	Proficiency in data analysis tools and techniques (e.g., Excel, SQL, Power BI, Tableau).
	Demonstrated ability to interpret complex operational data and translate it into actionable insights.
	Strong understanding of oil and gas upstream operations, including offshore service delivery.
	Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and critical thinking skills.
	Effective communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate across diverse teams.
	Experience with project management methodologies is a plus.
	Familiarity with QHSE standards and practices in the oil and gas sector.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, demanding environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Manager",
  "description": "DET Consulting &amp; Outsourcing Limited is a Human Resource and Outsourcing solutions firm committed to helping organizations attract top talent, optimize workforce performance, and drive business growth. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, HR advisory, training, and payroll services, delivering customized solutions that align with organizational goals. Our mission is simple: Empowering people, transforming businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Managing Director

Job Summary


	We are seeking a strategic and results-driven Marketing Manager to lead the company&rsquo;s marketing initiatives and drive brand growth.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing marketing strategies, managing campaigns, and overseeing brand positioning to increase market share and revenue.
	This role requires strong leadership, creativity, and a deep understanding of both digital and traditional marketing channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Plan, execute, and manage marketing campaigns across digital and offline channels.
	Lead brand positioning, awareness, and visibility initiatives.
	Conduct market research and analyze trends to identify new opportunities.
	Manage digital marketing efforts including social media, email marketing, and online advertising.
	Oversee content creation to ensure consistency in brand messaging.
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance using relevant metrics and tools.
	Manage marketing budgets and ensure optimal return on investment (ROI).
	Collaborate with sales and other departments to drive lead generation and conversion.
	Build and maintain relationships with external partners, agencies, and vendors.
	Lead, mentor, and manage the marketing team to achieve set targets.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience in marketing, with at least 2 years in a managerial role.
	Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools, platforms, and analytics.
	Proven track record of executing successful marketing campaigns.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced and results-driven environment.
	Professional certifications in marketing are an added advantage.


&nbsp;Salary
N400,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;info.detconsultingltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

Marketing Manager Job at DET Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        DET Consulting & Outsourcing Limited is a Human Resource and Outsourcing solutions firm committed to helping organizations attract top talent, optimize workforce performance, and drive business growth. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, HR advisory, training, and payroll services, delivering customized solutions that align with organizational goals. Our mission is simple: Empowering people, transforming businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Managing Director

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a strategic and results-driven Marketing Manager to lead the company’s marketing initiatives and drive brand growth.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing marketing strategies, managing campaigns, and overseeing brand positioning to increase market share and revenue.
	This role requires strong leadership, creativity, and a deep understanding of both digital and traditional marketing channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Plan, execute, and manage marketing campaigns across digital and offline channels.
	Lead brand positioning, awareness, and visibility initiatives.
	Conduct market research and analyze trends to identify new opportunities.
	Manage digital marketing efforts including social media, email marketing, and online advertising.
	Oversee content creation to ensure consistency in brand messaging.
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance using relevant metrics and tools.
	Manage marketing budgets and ensure optimal return on investment (ROI).
	Collaborate with sales and other departments to drive lead generation and conversion.
	Build and maintain relationships with external partners, agencies, and vendors.
	Lead, mentor, and manage the marketing team to achieve set targets.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience in marketing, with at least 2 years in a managerial role.
	Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools, platforms, and analytics.
	Proven track record of executing successful marketing campaigns.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced and results-driven environment.
	Professional certifications in marketing are an added advantage.


 Salary
N400,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
